scripts.db:up: podman start token-dashboard-db 2>/dev/null || podman run -d --name token-dashboard-db -e POSTGRES_USER=user -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=pass -e POSTGRES_DB=token_dashboard -p 5432:5432 -v token_dashboard_pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql docker.io/library/postgres:18
scripts.db:psql: podman exec -it token-dashboard-db psql -U user -d token_dashboard
scripts.db:schema: cat db/*.schema.sql | podman exec -i token-dashboard-db psql -U user -d token_dashboard -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1
scripts.db:seed: cat db/*.seed.sql | podman exec -i token-dashboard-db psql -U user -d token_dashboard -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1
scripts.db:reset: podman rm -f token-dashboard-db; podman volume rm token_dashboard_pgdata; bun run db:up
scripts.mongo:up: podman start token-dashboard-mongo 2>/dev/null || podman run -d --name token-dashboard-mongo -p 27017:27017 -v token_dashboard_mongodata:/data/db docker.io/library/mongo:8
scripts.mongo:schema: cat db/*.schema.js | podman exec -i token-dashboard-mongo mongosh token_dashboard --quiet
scripts.mongo:seed: cat db/*.seed.js | podman exec -i token-dashboard-mongo mongosh token_dashboard --quiet
scripts.mongo:reset: podman rm -f token-dashboard-mongo; podman volume rm token_dashboard_mongodata; bun run mongo:up
